friendly_name: Unified Charter Bundle and Read Chokepoint
source_description: Phase 2 of EPIC #461 (Charter as Synthesis & Doctrine Reference Graph) per issue #464: reorganize .kittify/charter/ into the architecture-§6 unified governance bundle, make ensure_charter_bundle_fresh() the sole read chokepoint (canonical-root resolution, no symlink, no copy, no per-worktree derived state), wire every charter-derivative reader through it, and land migration m_3_2_3_unified_bundle.py to cleanly upgrade populated 3.x projects.
